mapper.select: SELECT CASE WHEN ll.value IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE ll.value END value, rr.label_name as name, rr.label_level as id FROM ( SELECT labellevel AS id, count( DISTINCT labelcode ) AS value FROM synlte.labels GROUP BY labellevel ) ll RIGHT JOIN label_code_table rr ON ll.id = rr.label_level order by rr.label_level asc

select case when ll.value is null then 0 else ll.value end value, rr.label_name as name, rr.label_level as id from (select '1' as id, count(sjzybq1) as value from synlte.object where DELETED = 0 and upper(relate_tablename) = 'OBJECTFIELD' and sjzybq1 is not null union all select '2' as id, count(sjzybq2) as value from synlte.object where DELETED = 0 and upper(relate_tablename) = 'OBJECTFIELD' and sjzybq2 is not null union all select '3' as id, count(sjzybq3) as value from synlte.object where DELETED = 0 and upper(relate_tablename) = 'OBJECTFIELD' and sjzybq3 is not null union all select '4' as id, count(sjzybq4) as value from synlte.object where DELETED = 0 and upper(relate_tablename) = 'OBJECTFIELD' and sjzybq4 is not null union all select '5' as id, count(sjzybq5) as value from synlte.object where DELETED = 0 and upper(relate_tablename) = 'OBJECTFIELD' and sjzybq5 is not null union all select '6' as id, count(sjzybq6) as value from synlte.object where DELETED = 0 and upper(relate_tablename) = 'OBJECTFIELD' and sjzybq6 is not null ) ll right join label_code_table rr ON ll.id = rr.label_level order by rr.label_level asc

select l1.ID, l1.LABELNAME, l1.LABELCODE, l1.LABELLEVEL, l1.CLASSID, l1.LABELDESCRIBE, l1.AUTHOR, l1.labelLevelStr, case when r1.tableCount is null then 0 else r1.tableCount end as tableCount, r2.CODETEXT as classIdStr, l1.moddate, to_char(l1.moddate,'yyyy-mm-dd HH24:mi:ss') as moddateStr from(SELECT ID, LABELNAME, LABELCODE, LABELLEVEL, CLASSID, LABELDESCRIBE, AUTHOR, label_name as labelLevelStr, moddate FROM ( SELECT l.*,r.label_name ,row_number () over ( PARTITION BY LABELCODE ORDER BY moddate DESC ) AS num FROM synlte.LABELS l left join LABEL_CODE_TABLE r on l.LABELLEVEL = r.label_level) t WHERE t.num = 1) l1 left join (select LABELLEVEL, labelcode, tableCount from ( select 1 as LABELLEVEL,SJZYBQ1 as labelcode, count(distinct SJXJBM) as tableCount from synlte.PUBLIC_DATA_INFO where SJZYBQ1 is not null and zyzt = '1' group by SJZYBQ1 union all select 2 as LABELLEVEL, SJZYBQ2 as labelcode, count(distinct SJXJBM) as tableCount from synlte.PUBLIC_DATA_INFO where SJZYBQ2 is not null and zyzt = '1' group by SJZYBQ2 union all select 3 as LABELLEVEL, SJZYBQ3 as labelcode, count(distinct SJXJBM) as tableCount from synlte.PUBLIC_DATA_INFO where SJZYBQ3 is not null and zyzt = '1' group by SJZYBQ3 union all select 4 as LABELLEVEL, SJZYBQ4 as labelcode, count(distinct SJXJBM) as tableCount from synlte.PUBLIC_DATA_INFO where SJZYBQ4 is not null and zyzt = '1' group by SJZYBQ4 union all select 5 as LABELLEVEL,SJZYBQ5 as labelcode, count(distinct SJXJBM) as tableCount from synlte.PUBLIC_DATA_INFO where SJZYBQ5 is not null and zyzt = '1' group by SJZYBQ5 union all select 6 as LABELLEVEL, SJZYBQ6 as labelcode, count(distinct SJXJBM) as tableCount from synlte.PUBLIC_DATA_INFO where SJZYBQ6 is not null and zyzt = '1' group by SJZYBQ6 )) r1 on l1.LABELLEVEL = r1.LABELLEVEL and upper(l1.LABELCODE) = upper(r1.labelcode) left join (select distinct codename ,CODETEXT from V_CLASSIFY_INFO where PARCODEID ='JZCODEGASJZZFL') r2 on l1.CLASSID = r2.codename
order by nlssort(${sort},'NLS_SORT=SCHINESE_PINYIN_M') ${sortOrder} nulls last
order by moddate desc
select distinct label_level as id, label_name as name from LABEL_CODE_TABLE order by label_level
select distinct codename as id ,CODETEXT as name from V_CLASSIFY_INFO where PARCODEID ='JZCODEGASJZZFL' order by codename
mapper.update: update synlte.LABELS set labelname = #{labelName}, classid =#{classId},LABELDESCRIBE = #{labelDescribe},author = #{author},moddate = sysdate where labelcode = #{labelCode}
mapper.select:
select count(0) from synlte.LABELS
labelcode = #{labelCode} or labelname = #{labelName}
select distinct labelcode from synlte.LABELS where labellevel = #{level}

select count(0) from synlte.PUBLIC_DATA_INFO where (upper(sjzybq1) = upper(#{labelCode}) or upper(sjzybq2) = upper(#{labelCode}) or upper(sjzybq3) = upper(#{labelCode}) or upper(sjzybq4) = upper(#{labelCode}) or upper(sjzybq5) = upper(#{labelCode}) or upper(sjzybq6) = upper(#{labelCode})) and zyzt = '1'

select case when o.cnt is not null and o.cnt > 0 then labelname || '(' || o.cnt || ')' else labelname || '(0)' end as label,labelcode as value from (select * from synlte.labels where labellevel = #{labelLevel}) l left join (select value, cnt from (select value, count(*) as cnt from (select case when length(sjzybq1) = '1' then '100' || sjzybq1 else sjzybq1 end as value from synlte.object where deleted = 0 and upper(relate_tablename) = 'OBJECTFIELD' and sjzybq1 is not null) group by value order by value) union all select value, cnt from (select value, count(*) as cnt from (select case when length(sjzybq2) = '1' then '200' || sjzybq1 else sjzybq2 end as value from synlte.object where deleted = 0 and upper(relate_tablename) = 'OBJECTFIELD' and sjzybq2 is not null) group by value order by value) union all select value, cnt from (select value, count(*) as cnt from (select case when length(sjzybq3) = '1' then '300' || sjzybq1 else sjzybq3 end as value from synlte.object where deleted = 0 and upper(relate_tablename) = 'OBJECTFIELD' and sjzybq3 is not null) group by value order by value) union all select value, cnt from (select value, count(*) as cnt from (select case when length(sjzybq4) = '1' then '400' || sjzybq1 else sjzybq4 end as value from synlte.object where deleted = 0 and upper(relate_tablename) = 'OBJECTFIELD' and sjzybq4 is not null) group by value order by value) union all select value, cnt from (select value, count(*) as cnt from (select case when length(sjzybq5) = '1' then '500' || sjzybq1 else sjzybq5 end as value from synlte.object where deleted = 0 and upper(relate_tablename) = 'OBJECTFIELD' and sjzybq5 is not null) group by value order by value) union all select value, cnt from (select value, count(*) as cnt from (select case when length(sjzybq6) = '1' then '600' || sjzybq1 else sjzybq6 end as value from synlte.object where deleted = 0 and upper(relate_tablename) = 'OBJECTFIELD' and sjzybq6 is not null) group by value order by value) ) o on l.labelcode = o.value
select count(0) from synlte.LABELS where LABELLEVEL=#{labelLevel} and LABELCODE=#{labelCode}
